current_entry.description: Where research thinking takes shape: explore a problem before searching, weigh evidence from OpenAlex & Semantic Scholar, challenge your framing, track your beliefs, and keep a methodological account. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

change_history.old_value: Where research thinking takes shape: explore a problem before searching, weigh graded evidence from OpenAlex & Semantic Scholar, challenge your framing, track your beliefs, and keep a deterministic methodological account. Free by default; bring any LLM or none. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
